scan_interval.name: Scan Interval
scan_interval.hint: Interval of scanning unregistered stickers (Unit: minutes)

zh.name: 扫描间隔
zh.hint: 扫描未注册贴纸的间隔（单位：分钟）

recognition_model.name: Sticker Recognition Model
recognition_model.hint: VLM Model used to recognize sticker content, use default multimodal LLM by default

zh.name: 表情包识别模型
zh.hint: 用于识别表情包内容的模型 ID，留空使用默认多模态模型

recognition_prompt.name: Sticker Recognition Prompt
recognition_prompt.hint: Prompt to guide the model in recognizing sticker expressions and emotions, leave empty to use the default prompt

zh.name: 表情包识别提示词
zh.hint: 引导模型识别表情包表情和情绪的提示词，留空使用默认提示词

vlm_concurrency.name: VLM Concurrency
vlm_concurrency.hint: Maximum concurrent VLM calls for sticker description

zh.name: VLM 并发数
zh.hint: 贴纸 VLM 描述的最大并发数（最小 1）
